![](https://anyonsys.com/assets/site-images/sc/sc-research.jpg?v=cfc17f3)
# Work at the edge of science. Build for the real world.
Join Anyon Systems and help turn one of the most advanced fields in science into **real-world technology**. Since 2014, we’ve been building quantum computing as **deployable infrastructure**. Not just exploring what’s possible, but delivering systems that operate today.
We’re a team of engineers, physicists, and builders who value **precision, ownership, and impact**. If you’re driven to solve complex problems, work at the edge of innovation, and build technology that will redefine computing on a global scale, you’ll find your place here.
## Hiring process
Our hiring process is designed to be structured, transparent, and a two-way experience. It allows us to evaluate your skills while also giving you the opportunity to understand our team, our work, and our culture.
Throughout the process, you will have the opportunity to meet different members of the team and gain a clear understanding of how we work and what we value.
The process varies depending on the role, but typically includes the following steps:
  1. 01
  2. 02
  3. 03
  4. 04


Step 01
### Prescreen interview
An initial conversation to learn more about your background, experience, and motivation.
Step 02
### Online HR soft skills assessment
A remote evaluation focused on communication, collaboration, motivation, and cultural fit.
Step 03
### Technical and/or role-based interview
A deeper discussion covering technical expertise, problem-solving approach, and real-world scenarios relevant to the role.
Step 04
### Final conversations
Additional discussions with key stakeholders to ensure mutual alignment before moving forward.
## Why you should work here
![](https://anyonsys.com/assets/site-images/sc/sc-colab.jpg?v=cfc17f3)
  * ### Work with brilliant people
At Anyon Systems, you will work alongside engineers, physicists, and builders solving some of the most complex problems in quantum computing. You will be surrounded by people who value depth, precision, and intellectual rigour.
  * ### In-person collaboration
We work together in our office environment because we believe the best ideas come from close collaboration. Being in the same space allows for faster iteration, stronger alignment, and deeper technical exchange.
  * ### Mature, high-performance culture
We value ownership, accountability, and clarity. Our culture is built for people who are independent in their thinking, serious about their craft, and able to collaborate in a calm, focused, and respectful environment.
  * ### Continuous growth in a cutting-edge field
Quantum computing is still an emerging frontier. You will continuously learn, challenge yourself, and contribute to real systems that push the boundaries of what is possible in computing.


If you’re ready to build, deploy, and shape the future of quantum computing.
[View open roles](https://anyon.bamboohr.com/careers)
![Anyon Systems](https://anyonsys.com/assets/logo_pure-white.svg?v=cfc17f3)
Full-stack superconducting quantum systems. Designed and built in Montréal.
